Engineering Team

End-to-End Design Services

From initial schematic capture to comprehensive SI/PI simulation, our engineering team ensures your project is ready for professional manufacturing.

Schematic Engineering

Expert schematic capture and hierarchical design for complex system architectures.

Explore capability

High-Speed Layout

Precision routing for DDR4/5, PCIe Gen 4/5, and ultra-high-speed differential pairs.

Explore capability

SI/PI Simulation

Pre and post-layout Signal & Power Integrity analysis to ensure robust performance.

Explore capability

RF & Wireless

Specialized layout for antenna integration, RF matching, and EMI/EMC compliance.

Explore capability

Thermal Management

Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) and thermal modeling for high-power electronics.

Explore capability

Library Services

IPC-7351 compliant footprint creation and centralized component management.

Explore capability

Supporting Mission-Critical Industries

Our designs are trusted by industry leaders in sectors where failure is not an option.

Medical Grade Devices
Aerospace & Aviation
Industrial IoT Networks
Automotive Systems
High-Speed Computing
Consumer Wearables

Design Capabilities & Deliverables

Comprehensive manufacturing packages and technical specifications included with every design project.

Layer Counts

1 to 32 layers (Rigid, Flex, and Rigid-Flex)

Board Complexity

Blind & Buried Vias, Microvias, HDI Any-layer

High Speed

Controlled Impedance, Length Matching, Signal integrity

Software Stack

Altium Designer, Cadence Allegro, KiCAD, Mentor Graphics

Design Standards

IPC-2221, IPC-7351, Mil-STD compliance

Deliverables

Gerbers (X2), BOM, Pick-and-Place, Step files, Project Source

Let's turn your concept into a production-ready reality. Consult with our expert engineering team today.
